title: Stargarder Bruch I
description: Der Stargarder Bruch, eine Niedermoorfläche am Rande der Stadt Neubrandenburg am Tollensesee ist eine geheimnisvolle Teichlandschaft mit Ried- und Röhrichtflächen, offenen Wassern und Bruchwaldzonen. Hier hat sich eine eine artenreiche Vogelwelt angesiedelt, auch Fische, Lurche und Reptilien. Unter den vielen Vogelarten sind mehrere streng geschützte Arten wie der Rohrschwirl oder die Wiesenweihe zu finden. Auch als Rastplatz durchziehender Wintergäste besitzt das Gebiet Bedeutung.

title: Ottoman Period Headstone
description: While traversing a narrow country lane 15 km south of Tirana, I had noted this old cemetery during a previous trip here.  Hankering to go back, it happened this trip.  The Ottomans ruled Albanian during periods from 1415 to 1912.  In 1912, they were ousted for good and Albania declared its independence, at least for a while.  The Ottoman headstones bear different shapes, depending on their status or rank.  The ages have taken their toll and no or, at best, faint markings remain.  These were only the ones we could see. There are some faint marking still visible on this uniquely shaped headstone.

title: Ancient graveyard with Ottoman period headstones
description: While traversing a narrow country lane 15 km south of Tirana, I had noted this old cemetery during a previous trip here.  Hankering to go back, it happened this trip.  The Ottomans ruled Albania during periods from 1415 to 1912.  In 1912, they were ousted for good and Albania declared its independence, at least for a while.  The Ottoman headstones bear different shapes, depending on their status or rank.  The ages have taken their toll and no or, at best, faint markings remain.  These were only the ones we could see.  No doubt were the undergrowth cleared, many more could be seen.

title: Walking the Earth
description: I read an article yesterday about a man, Eric who had walked around the planet. Sort of. For the last decade, he had walked the same promenade every day year-round in the picturesque Hagaparken. No matter the weather. He was celebrated yesterday with flowers and cake. This man has done the same. His daily walk takes him from Tungelsta to the retirement home in Västerhaninge where his wife lives, and then home again. I don't know his name but we often stop for a chat. He is always very positive and has told me quite a few stories over the years. I guess I should buy him coffee one day. And cake.

title: RAGOGNA. OGGI,14 NEVEMBRE 2019
description:
UNA PASSEGGIATA IN CAMPAGNA.


Passeggiare all’aria aperta è divertente e fa bene al corpo, oltre ad essere di grande beneficio per il cervello e per la mente. Chiunque potrà confermarvelo. Ma, al di là delle testimonianze personali, è scientificamente dimostrato che passare del tempo all’aria aperta apporti dei benefici per la mente.
Passeggiare all’aria aperta aiuta a lottare contro la negatività, ad alleviare lo stress e anche a combattere la depressione. La sensazione di libertà fisica che si prova all’aria aperta aiuta a sentirsi liberi anche mentalmente e ad essere più ottimisti.
L'Organizzazione Mondiale della Sanità raccomanda di camminare trenta minuti con intensità moderata almeno tre o quattro volte la settimana. Fare una passeggiata è un esercizio semplice e gratuito in grado di salvare da obesità e disturbi dell'umore. Camminando si abbattono i rischi cardiovascolari collegati al fumo e alla vita sedentaria.


Immagine realizzata con lo smartphone HUAWEI MATE 20 PRO

title: Ice and Snow Sculpture Festival
description: The Harbin International Ice and Snow Sculpture Festival is an annual winter festival that takes place with a theme in Harbin, Heilongjiang, China. This festival is the largest ice and snow festival in the world. The state capital Magdeburg in Saxony-Anhalt (Germany) and the metropolis Harbin (China) are twin cities. For this reason, an International Ice and Snow Sculpture Festival took place in Magdeburg for the first time in 2018. However, the festival in Magdeburg was much smaller than in the city of Harbin. Nevertheless, the Ice and Snow Sculpture Festival in Magdeburg should be repeated annually. Das Internationale Eis- und Schneeskulpturenfestival von Harbin ist ein jährliches Winterfestival, das mit einem Thema in Harbin, Heilongjiang, China, stattfindet. Dieses Festival ist das größte Eis- und Schneefestival der Welt. Die Landeshauptstadt Magdeburg in Sachsen-Anhalt (Deutschland) und die Millionenmetropole Harbin (China) sind Partnerstädte. Aus diesem Grund fand im Jahre 2018 zum ersten Mal ein Internationales Eis- und Schneeskulpturenfestival auch in Magdeburg statt. Das Festival in Magdeburg war jedoch wesentlich kleiner als in der Stadt Harbin. Dennoch soll auch das Eis- und Schneeskulpturenfestival in Magdeburg jährlich wiederholt werden. :-) Info Harbin (Deutsch/German): de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Harbin Info Harbin (Englisch/English): en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Harbin :-) Info Städtepartnerschaft: de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gemeindepartnerschaft Info Sister city: en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sister_city :-) Magdeburg hat sich als Kulturhauptstadt Europas für das Jahr 2025 beworben und hat gute Chancen Kulturhauptstadt Europas zu werden! title: Tutto è sognare - Everything is dreaming
description:
Digital Painting - Graphic Art
Arte digitale nell'arte visiva, c'è la pittura digitale.
Digital art in visual art, there is digital painting.
--------
Dicono?

Dicono?
Dimenticano.
Non dicono?
Hanno detto.

Fanno?
È fatale.
Non fanno?
È uguale.

Perché
aspettare?
- Tutto è
sognare.

Fernando Pessoa

Non ho filosofia: ho senso
(Digital Painting)- di Eugenio Costa

-----------------------------
They say?

They say?
They forget.
Don't they say?
They said.

Do?
It's fatal.
Don't they?
It's the same.

Why
wait?
- All is
to dream.

Fernando Pessoa

I have no philosophy: I make sense
(Digital Painting) - by Eugenio Costa

title: Snowfall
description:
Snowfall (Lessinia plateau 20191114)

The Lessini mountain group in the Veneto Prealps, are the hills that rise just north of Verona and acts as a border between the Veneto Region and Trentino Alto Adige Region. The Lessini mountain group reaches to, just over 2000 meters a.s.l. and has multiple valleys and long ridges that descend down towards the Po valley.

title: „Lucrarea lui Dumnezeu și practica omului”
description: Cuvântul lui Dumnezeu „Lucrarea lui Dumnezeu și practica omului” (2) Fulgerul de la Răsărit, Biserica lui Dumnezeu Atotputernic a fost creată datorită arătării și lucrării lui Dumnezeu Atotputernic, q-a doua venire a Domnului Isus, Hristosul zilelor de pe urmă. Aceasta este alcătuită din toți cei care acceptă lucrarea lui Dumnezeu Atotputernic în zilele de pe urmă și care sunt cuceriți și mântuiți de cuvintele Lui. Biserica a fost întemeiată personal, în întregime de Dumnezeu Atotputernic și este condusă de El, ca Păstor. Cu siguranță aceasta nu a fost creată de o persoană. Hristos este adevărul, calea și viața. Oile lui Dumnezeu aud glasul Lui . Atâta timp cât citiți cuvintele lui Dumnezeu Atotputernic, veți vedea că Dumnezeu S-a arătat. title: Doar cei ce au fost curățiți vor intra în odihnă
description: Cele mai frumoase cantari crestine „Doar cei ce au fost curățiți vor intra în odihnă” Rasa umană a viitorului, deși urmași ai lui Adam și ai Evei, nu va mai trăi în sfera Satanei, ci o rasă salvată, curățită. E o omenire judecată și mustrată, o omenire ce-a fost sfințită. E diferită de rasa străveche, rasa străveche a lui Adam și-a Evei, aproape o rasă complet nouă, atât de diferită. Ales din cei corupți de Satana, stând ferm în judecata finală a lui Dumnezeu, acest ultim grup rămas, cu Dumnezeu, intră-n odihna finală. Doar cei ce pot sta fermi prin judecata și mustrarea zilelor de pe urmă, în lucrarea finală de curățire, pot intra-n odihna finală cu Dumnezeu. E o omenire judecată și mustrată, o omenire ce-a fost sfințită. E diferită de rasa străveche, rasa străveche a lui Adam și-a Evei, aproape o rasă complet nouă, atât de diferită. Ales din cei corupți de Satana, stând ferm în judecata lui Dumnezeu, acest ultim grup rămas, cu Dumnezeu, intră-n odihna finală. E diferită de rasa străveche, rasa străveche a lui Adam și a Evei, aproape o rasă complet nouă, atât de diferită. Prin lucrarea finală de curățire, cei ce intră în odihnă vor fi eliberați de puterea Satanei și dobândiți de Dumnezeu. Vor intra-n odihna finală. Vor intra-n odihna finală. din „Urmați Mielul și cântați cântări noi” Sursa imaginilor ：Biserica lui Dumnezeu Atotputernic Termeni de utilizare：https://ro.kingdomsalvation.org/disclaimer.html

title: Ice and Snow Sculpture Festival
description: The Harbin International Ice and Snow Sculpture Festival is an annual winter festival that takes place with a theme in Harbin, Heilongjiang, China. This festival is the largest ice and snow festival in the world. The state capital Magdeburg in Saxony-Anhalt (Germany) and the metropolis Harbin (China) are twin cities. For this reason, an International Ice and Snow Sculpture Festival took place in Magdeburg for the first time in 2018. However, the festival in Magdeburg was much smaller than in the city of Harbin. Nevertheless, the Ice and Snow Sculpture Festival in Magdeburg should be repeated annually. Das Internationale Eis- und Schneeskulpturenfestival von Harbin ist ein jährliches Winterfestival, das mit einem Thema in Harbin, Heilongjiang, China, stattfindet. Dieses Festival ist das größte Eis- und Schneefestival der Welt. Die Landeshauptstadt Magdeburg in Sachsen-Anhalt (Deutschland) und die Millionenmetropole Harbin (China) sind Partnerstädte. Aus diesem Grund fand im Jahre 2018 zum ersten Mal ein Internationales Eis- und Schneeskulpturenfestival auch in Magdeburg statt. Das Festival in Magdeburg war jedoch wesentlich kleiner als in der Stadt Harbin. Dennoch soll auch das Eis- und Schneeskulpturenfestival in Magdeburg jährlich wiederholt werden. :-) Info Harbin (Deutsch/German): de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Harbin Info Harbin (Englisch/English): en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Harbin :-) Info Städtepartnerschaft: de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gemeindepartnerschaft Info Sister city: en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sister_city :-) Magdeburg hat sich als Kulturhauptstadt Europas für das Jahr 2025 beworben und hat gute Chancen Kulturhauptstadt Europas zu werden! title: Falaises de Faraglioni à Capri
description: Les Faraglioni di Capri sont le nom donné à trois falaises situées au sud de l'île de Capri. Leur aspect particulier est le résultat de millénaires d'érosion par le vent et la pluie associé à la force érosive de la mer. La première, à gauche, de 110 m est toujours rattachée à la terre et s'appelle Stella (l'étoile), la seconde de 80 m, par contre, est séparée par un bras de mer Faraglione di Mezzo qui possède une arche à sa base et la troisième Faraglione di Fuori ou Scopolo, à droite, mesure 102 m (cf. wikipédia).

title: the first winterday in Upper Austria
Milk Bar in Nowa Huta, Krakow, Poland
description: The Polish milk bar (‘bar mleczny’ in Polish) - These cafeterias, serving traditional Polish cuisine, provide a grim glimpse into Eastern Bloc Poland. I love them! For the cost of a few coins, you can get yourself a great meal. A visit to the milk bar is a required cultural experience for anyone who has just set foot in the country. Poland’s first milk bar was actually opened on Krakow’s Main Market Square on May 30, 1948. Originally no hot dishes were served; this was a place where you went simply to enjoy milk (hence the name), humbly served in .25 litre glass with a straw. Run by the government, this was the Party’s ‘clever’ attempt at popularizing milk-drinking (as opposed to moonshine), inspired by Poland’s large surplus of dairy products. As restaurants were nationalized by communist authorities, more and more milk bars appeared in their place, with the Party concept being to provide cheap, dairy-based meals to the masses; in fact meals at the local milk bar were often included in a worker’s salary. In addition to dairy products, milk bars offered omelettes and egg cutlets, and the famous pierogi. Times were so desperate under communism that many milk bars chained the cutlery to the table to deter rampant thievery. Orders today as back then are still taken by the all-business babcias (Polish grannies). This one is located on Plac Centralny (or Ronald Reagan Square) in the Nowa Huta section of Krakow. It was constructed in the early 1950s and is one of the most genuine milk bars in Poland. ♥ Facebook • 500px • Shutterstock • Dreamstime ♥

title: Identitatea lui Hristoseste Dumnezeu Însuşi
description: Cantari Crestine noi „Identitatea lui Hristoseste Dumnezeu Însuşi" Divinitatea lui Hristos este deasupra omenirii; Autoritatea supremă peste toate ființele vii. Aceasta este divinitatea Lui, firea şi existența lui Dumnezeu. Ele sunt cele care-I determină identitatea. Umanitatea Sa e normală, din oricare rol vorbește, Și-n totalitate se supune voii lui Dumnezeu, totuși e Dumnezeu, fără-ndoială. Natura umană a lui Hristos unii nebuni o văd ca defect. Ei refuză să-L recunoască, deși divinitatea Și-a arătat-o. Cu cât e mai supus și mai umil, cu atât mai mult ei Îl disprețuiesc. Unii chiar vor să-L excludă și slăvesc „chipurile veacului”. Dumnezeul întrupat se supune voii lui Dumnezeu, naturii Lui umane și reale. Dumnezeul întrupat se supune voii lui Dumnezeu, naturii Lui umane și reale. De-aceea oamenii I se opun și se răzvrătesc împotriva Lui. Umanitatea Sa e normală, din oricare rol vorbeşte, Și-n totalitate se supune voii lui Dumnezeu, totuși e Dumnezeu, fără-ndoială. din „Cuvântul Se arată în trup” Sursa imaginilor ：Biserica lui Dumnezeu Atotputernic Termeni de utilizare：https://ro.kingdomsalvation.org/disclaimer.html

description:
Waiting for winter (Lessinia plateau 20191114)

The Lessini mountain group in the Veneto Prealps, are the hills that rise just north of Verona and acts as a border between the Veneto Region and Trentino Alto Adige Region. The Lessini mountain group reaches to, just over 2000 meters a.s.l. and has multiple valleys and long ridges that descend down towards the Po valley.
The Lessinia is a zone of ancient origin, noted especially for its abundance of fossils. Significant traces of human settlement have also been discovered here.

title: Gehöft Nr. 5 in Wihlaw
description: Vlhlavy - Statek čp. 5 Das Gehöft mit der Konskriptionsnummer Statek čp. 5 in Wihlaw (Vlhlavy) ist ein typisches Beispiel für den südböhmischen Bauernbarock der 1. Hälfte des 19. Jahrhunderts. Das reich verzierte Anwesen mit der Jahreszahl 1841 liegt malerisch unmittelbar am Damm des Wihlawer Teichs (Vlhlavský rybník).

title: Bauernbarock in Chraschtian
description: Malé Chrášťany - Selské baroko Das seit 1273 nachweisbare Dorf Chraschtian (Malé Chrášťany) verfügt über ein zauberhaftes Ensemble von Gehöfen im Stil des Bauernbarock, wie er in Südböhmen während der 1. Hälfte des 19. Jahrhunderts typisch war. Seit 1995 ist das Dorf daher als staatiches Denkmalschutzreservat geschützt.

title: Was bedeutet der wahre Glaube an Gott?
description: www.bibel-de.org/wahre-Glaube-an-Gott.html Willkommen auf unserer Webseite „DIE BIBEL STUDIEREN“, der Sabbat ist sehr wichtig für diejenigen, die an Gott glauben. Es ist der Tag, an dem wir Gott anzubeten. Erinneren uns daran, nachdem wir das Evangelium des Herrn Jesus angenommen haben, erhalten wir von Gott viele Gnaden und Segnungen. Wir haben viele Zeugnisse und Erfahrungen der Christen gesammelt, wie sie von Gott die Gnade erlangen. Die können uns helfen, in unserem Glauben zu wachsen. Willkommen zum Klicken und Lesen.

title: Péninsule de Sorrente et port de Marina grande sur l'île de Capri
description: Le port de Marina Grande est le principal port de l'île, au nord de la ville principale de Capri et au pied du mont Solaro, dotée d'une plage remarquable, la plus grande de l'île. Une petite place la surplombe entourée de maisons caractéristiques, rendues typiques par leurs terrasses, balcons, galeries ouvertes, et les façades multicolores de la ville. Celle-ci est également caractérisée par des pentes en terrasses abruptes à la flore méditerranéenne (cf. wikipédia).

title: Port de Sorrente
description: Sorrente a donné son nom à la péninsule de Sorrente (penisola sorrentina) au sud de l'Italie, près de Pompéi, dans le golfe de Naples, dominée par la splendide silhouette du Vésuve. Juchée sur une falaise de 50 m, la ville possède de nombreuses belles églises, une cathédrale et un Palais épiscopal reconstruit au XVIème siècle après sa destruction par les turcs en 1558. Le musée Correale dans une ancienne demeure patricienne abrite une des plus grandes collections de porcelaine de Capodimonte en Italie. Située juste en face de l'île de Capri, Sorrente est mondialement célèbre pour la production de limoncello, liqueur obtenue par macération d'écorces de citron, d'alcool, d'eau et de sucre (cf. wikipédia).

title: 20191115_i3k Lisa Gerrard singing at a Hans Zimmer concert (Hans wasn't there in person, but I hadn't known that Lisa would be!) | Scandinavium, Gothenburg, Sweden
description: 1 year ago today... *sniffle* Hans Zimmer is probably my fave movie composer... and the "Gladiator" soundtrack is my fave soundtrack... and "Gladiator" and "Thelma & Louise" are among my top 5 movies... :B However, I hadn't planned on attending this Zimmer-less show - I was watching a movie at home that evening, and randomly paused to check my phone (which was on silent as usual). There was a text from Carolin saying she had a spare ticket for the concert, which would begin in a couple of hours (just down the road from me), and would I like to come? AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA OK THEN. So I went there with Carolin and her brother. :D Nice music obv, and nice visuals, and Sirprize Lisa Gerrard! Had to hush a couple of manbabies who were conversing behind us. -_- A short while later, I booked another Zimmer concert where he would appear in person - in Stockholm, April 2021. Although that's been postponed until February 2022... for now... D: ------------------------------- Vegan FAQ! :) The Web Site the Meat Industry Doesn't Want You to See. Please watch Earthlings.

title: Muzeum Sztuki
description: Museum Sztuki (Göteborgs konstmuseum), Götaplatsen, Göteborg, 15 listopada 2019 r. Budynek muzeum wybudowano w 1923 r. wg projektu Sigfrida Ericsona. Wieńczy on reprezentacyjną aleję Kungsportsavenyen. Muzeum gromadzi przede wszystkim sztukę nordycką od XV w., ale w zbiorach znajdują się też dzieła Rembrandta, Van Gogha, Picassa czy Warhola. ** Art Museum (Göteborgs konstmuseum), Götaplatsen, Gothenburg, November 15, 2019 The museum building was built in 1923 according to the design by Sigfrid Ericson. It closed the representative Kungsportsavenyen. The museum gathers mostly Nordic art since the 15th century however works of Rembrandt, Van Gogh, Picasso and Warhol are also in the collection.

title: Fontanna Posejdona
description: Fontanna Posejdona (Poseidonbrunnen), Götaplatsen, Göteborg, 15 listopada 2019 r. ** Poseidon Fountain (Poseidonbrunnen), Götaplatsen, Gothenburg, November 15, 2019

title: Kungsportsavenyen
description: Kungsportsavenyen, Göteborg, 15 listopada 2019 r. Reprezentacyjną aleję wytyczono w latach 1860-70. Zaczyna się za dawną fosą otaczającą miejskie fortyfikacje, gdzie kiedyś znajdowała się Brama Królewska (Kungsporten) i biegnie do Götaplatsen, mijając po drodze m.in. Teatr Wielki (Stora Teatern). ** Kungsportsavenyen, Gothenburg, November 15, 2019 The representative avenue was built in 1860-1870. It starts at the old moat outside the city fortifications when the King's Gate (Kungsporten) used to stand and runs up to Götaplatsen, passing along the Great Theatre (Stora Teatern)

title: Hala targowa

Budynek hali targowej został wybudowany w 1889 r. na największym wówczas targowisku - Targu Królewskim (Kungstorget). Budynek zaprojektował Hans Hedlund. ** Market hall (Saluhallen), Kungstorget, Gothenburg, November 15, 2019 The market hall was built in 1889 at the then largest market square - Royal Market Square (Kungstorget). The building was designed by Hans Hedlund.

title: Dawny dworzec
description:
Dawny dworzec kolei Bergslagen, Bergslagsgatan, Göteborg, 15 listopada 2019 r.
Wybudowany w 1881 r. wg projektu Axela Kumliena i Hjalmara Kumliena budynek to dawny dworzec kolei Bergslagen (Bergslagernas Järnvägar), która była największym prywatnym przedsiębiorstwem kolejowym. Zostało założone w latach 70. XIX i łączyła Göteborg z Falun, leżącym w bogatym w rud żelaza regionem Bergslagen. W 1948 r. przedsiębiorstwo znacjonalizowano i włączono do Szwedzkich Kolei Państwowych (SJ).
**
Old Bergslagen Railways station building, Bergslagsgatan, Gothenburg, November 15, 2019
The building built in 1881 according to plans by Axel Kumlien and Hjalmar Kumlien is the old station of the Bergslagen Railways (Bergslagernas Järnvägar) which was the largest private railway company. It was founded in the 1870s and linked Göteborg with Falun located in the ore-rich Bergslagen region. In 1948 the company was nationalised and merged into the Swedish State Railways (SJ).

title: Rc6
description: Lokomotywa Rc6 #1419 na stacji Göteborg Central, 15 listopada 2019 r. Lokomotywy serii Rc są najliczniejszymi lokomotywami elektrycznymi na szwedzkich torach. Wykorzystywane są zarówno w transporcie pasażerskim, jak i towarowym. Udany projekt wyeksportowano ponadto do Austrii, Norwegii, Iranu i Stanów Zjednoczonych. Lokomotywy produkowane były w latach 1967-88 przez szwedzkie przedsiębiorstwo ASEA. Lokomotywa typu Rc6 ma moc 3600 kW i prędkość maksymalną 160 km/h. ** Rc6 locomotive #1419 at Göteborg Central station, November 15, 2019 Class Rc is the most numerous electric locomotives in Sweden. They are used both in passenger and freight trains. The successful design was also exported to Austria, Norway, Iran and the USA. The locomotives were manufactured from 1967 to 1988 by the Swedish company ASEA. Model Rc6 has the power of 3,600 kW and the maximum speed of 160 km/h.

title: Kościół Karola Jana
description:
Kościół Karola Jana (Carl Johans kyrka), Karl Johansgatan, Göteborg, 15 listopada 2019 r.
Kościół zbudowany został w latach 1824-26 wg projektu Fredrika Bloma. W 1900 r. dodano ozdobny hełm na wieży. Kościół i parafia noszą imię króla Karola XIV Jana.
**
Carl Johan church (Carl Johans kyrka), Karl Johansgatan, Gothenburg, November 15, 2019
The church was built in 1824-26 according to plans by Fredrik Blom. In 1900 a decorative lantern on the tower was added. The church and the parish are named after King Charles XIV John.

title: Teatr Lorensberg
description: Teatr Lorensberg (Lorensbergsteatern), Karl Gerhards Plats, Göteborg, 15 listopada 2019 r. Teatr wybudowano i zainaugurowano w 1916 r. z inicjatywy Sophusa Petersena. Budynek zaprojektował Karl Bengtsson. Kiedy w 1934 r. scena przeniosła się do nowo wybudowanego Teatru Miejskiego (Stadsteatern), w budynku uruchomiono kino. Od 1954 do 1996 r. mieściło się tu także Muzeum Historii Teatru (Teaterhistoriska museet). W 1987 r. ponownie przekształcono kino w teatr. ** Lorensberg Theatre (Lorensbergsteatern), Karl Gerhards Plats, Gothenburg, November 15, 2019 The theatre was built and inaugurated in 1916 from the initiative of Sophus Petersen. The building was designed by Karl Bengtsson. When the scene moved to the newly-built City Theatre (Stadsteatern), a cinema was opened in the building. Additionally, between 1954 and 1996 the Theatre History Museum (Teaterhistoriska museet) was seated here. In 1987 the cinema was again converted into a theatre.

title: Rathaus Riga
description:
Das Rathaus Riga (lettisch Rīgas rātsnams) ist das Rathaus der lettischen Hauptstadt Riga.
Es befindet sich in der Rigaer Altstadt auf der Nordwestseite des Rathausplatzes (Rātslaukums) an der Adresse Rathausplatz 1.
Ein Vorgängerbau des heutigen Rathauses entstand Anfang des 14. Jahrhunderts. Es verfügte im Erdgeschoss über Lauben sowie Ratsstube und Bürgersaal. Vermutlich war das mit einem Turm versehene Gebäude als Backsteinbau auf rechteckigem Grundriss errichtet und verfügte über schlichte, in Stufenform ausgeführte Seitengiebel, ähnlich dem Revaler Rathaus. An der Außenseite des Gebäudes befand sich ein 1466 von Johann von der Lynen geschaffenes Marienbild.

Während des Nordischen Kriegs kam es zu Zerstörungen, so dass ein Neubau nötig wurde. Der Neubau begann 1750 durch den Ingenieur-Oberstleutnant Friedrich von Oettinger. Der durch Beiträge der Bürgerschaft finanzierte Bau wurde 1765 vollendet. Das Untergeschoss wurde zunächst zur Hälfte durch die Kaufmannschaft der Börse genutzt, bis diese im 19. Jahrhundert ein eigenes Gebäude bezogen. Anlässlich der Eröffnungsfeier veröffentlichte Johann Gottfried Herder 1765 die Festschrift Haben wir noch jetzt das Publikum und das Vaterland der Alten?.

Entstanden war ein zweigeschossiger Bau mit Mansarddach und einer 60 Meter langen Straßenfront. Der Giebel war mit Wappen verziert, ein durchbrochenes Gesims lief um das Gebäude. Bekrönt war der Bau von einem zierlichen Glockenturm. Das Rathaus verfügte über einen mit toskanischen Säulen versehenen Vorbau. 1791 wurde das Mansarddach ausgebaut. Ein drittes Geschoss wurde dann von 1847 bis 1850 aufgesetzt. Im Obergeschoss wurde 1883 die Rigaer Stadtbibliothek mit 120.000 Bänden untergebracht. Darüber hinaus befand sich im Inneren ein Wandgemälde. Als Schmuck im Außenbereich bestand eine aus Kanonenrohren des Nordischen Kriegs bestehende Umzäunung, die durch Ketten miteinander verbunden waren.
Das Haus diente als Tagungsort für den deutschen Rat der Stadt, bis er durch eine russische Stadtreform abgeschafft wurde.Im Erdgeschoss war die städtische Diskontobank sowie das Vormundschaftsamt Rigas ansässig. Die Rigaer Stadtverwaltung war in der Großen Königstraße (Ķēniņu) 5 und nicht im historischen Ratsgebäude untergebracht.

Während des Zweiten Weltkriegs wurde das Rathaus weitgehend zerstört. Schon im Juni 1941 waren im Wesentlichen nur noch die Außenmauern erhalten.

Im Jahr 2003 wurde das heutige Rathaus an gleicher Stelle fertig gestellt. Der Neubau zitiert die historische Bauweise, verbindet damit jedoch auch moderne Architekturelemente. Auf der Rückseite des Gebäudes wurde eine Einkaufspassage angefügt. Dort ist auch ein historischer Eichenstamm zu sehen, der bei den Bauarbeiten gefunden wurde.

title: Kreta - Kloster Agia Triada 05
description:
Moni Agia Triada (auch Agios Triados Tsangarolon) wurde 1631 am südlichen Rand des nordöstlichen Gebirgszuges von Akrotiri erbaut. Es ist eine der heiligen Dreifaltigkeit geweihte Gründung zweier venezianischer Mönche, die der orthodoxen Kirche beigetreten waren, den Brüdern Giancarolo (Zangarola). Sie renovierten ein älteres Kloster, das ihnen von einer Familie Mourtari geschenkt worden war. Die in Oliven- und Orangenhaine eingebetteten Gebäude sind in venezianischem Renaissance-Stil errichtet. Sie wurden im Jahre 1830 wieder aufgebaut, nachdem das Kloster 1821 durch die herrschenden Türken niedergebrannt wurde. Moni Agia Triada untersteht direkt dem Patriarchat von Konstantinopel.

Moni Agia Triada (also Agios Triados Tsangarolon) was built in 1631 on the southern edge of the north-eastern mountain range of Akrotiri. It is a foundation dedicated to the Holy Trinity and was founded by two Venetian monks who had joined the Orthodox Church, the brothers Giancarolo (Zangarola). They renovated an older monastery that had been given to them by a Mourtari family. The buildings, nestled in olive and orange groves, are built in the Venetian Renaissance style. They were rebuilt in 1830, after the monastery was burned down by the ruling Turks in 1821. Moni Agia Triada is directly under the Patriarchate of Constantinople.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

title: Kreta - Aptera 01
description:
Aptera ist eine archäologische Stätte in Westkreta über der Bucht von Souda. Es war einer der wichtigsten Stadtstaaten Kretas. 
Das ausgedehnte Ruinenfeld von Aptera ist auf einem Plateau in einer Höhe von 150 m beim Dorf Megala Chorafia südlich der Souda-Bucht in Westkreta gelegen, 13 km östlich von Chania. Etwas westlich liegt der kleine heutige Ort Aptera. Am Fuß des Hügels verläuft die Nationalstraße 90 an der Küste entlang. In der direkten Umgebung befinden sich einige Olivenhaine, zwischen denen noch Ruinenreste zu erkennen sind. Die restliche Umgebung ist nur spärlich bewachsen. Um das Plateau herum sind besonders im Westen und Osten noch Teile der alten Festungsmauer zu erkennen.
Die Hochfläche war seit der Bronzezeit bis in die christliche Zeit kontinuierlich besiedelt. Der Name Aptera findet sich schon auf Schrifttafeln von Knossos aus dem 14. bis 13. Jahrhundert vor Chr. Von der Geschichte der alten Stadt, die im 17. Jahrhundert vor Christus gegründet wurde und an der Stelle des heutigen Paleokastro bei Megala Chorafia lag, ist nicht viel bekannt, obwohl sie seit der minoischen Zeit aufgrund ihrer strategisch günstigen Lage große Bedeutung hatte, die erst im hellenistischen Zeitalter nachließ. Aptera war eine blühende Schifffahrts- und Handelsstadt und hatte seinen Hafen in Kissamo (in der Nähe von Kalives). Aptera entsandte im 2. Messenischen Krieg (um 640 vor Christus) Bogenschützen als Hilfe an die Sparter und war während des Bürgerkriegs der kretischen Städte 220 vor Christus mit Knossos verbündet. Später verbündete sich Aptera gemeinsam mit 30 anderen kretischen Städten mit Eumenes II., dem Koenig von Pergamon. Durch ein Erdbeben im 7. Jahrhundert vor Chr. wurde sie zerstört, kam jedoch in römischer Zeit zu neuer Blüte. Bei der Invasion der Sarazenen im Jahre 824 n. Chr. wurde die Stadt zerstört und geplündert. 

Aptera is an archaeological site in Western Crete above the bay of Souda. It was one of the most important city states of Crete. 
The extensive ruins of Aptera are located on a plateau at an altitude of 150 m near the village of Megala Chorafia south of Souda Bay in Western Crete, 13 km east of Chania. A little to the west is the small village of Aptera. At the foot of the hill the National Road 90 runs along the coast. In the immediate vicinity there are some olive groves, between which ruins can still be seen. The rest of the surroundings is only sparsely overgrown. Around the plateau, especially in the west and east, parts of the old fortress wall can still be seen.
The plateau was continuously populated from the Bronze Age until the Christian era. The name Aptera can already be found on writing tablets of Knossos from the 14th to 13th century B.C. Not much is known about the history of the old town, which was founded in the 17th century B.C. and was located on the site of today's Paleokastro near Megala Chorafia, although it had great importance since the Minoan era due to its strategically favourable position, which only diminished in the Hellenistic Age. Aptera was a flourishing shipping and trading town and had its port at Kissamo (near Kalives). Aptera sent archers to help the Spartans in the 2nd Messinian War (around 640 BC) and was allied with Knossos during the civil war of the Cretan cities in 220 BC. Later Aptera, together with 30 other Cretan cities, allied with Eumenes II, King of Pergamon. It was destroyed by an earthquake in the 7th century B.C., but came to new prosperity in Roman times. During the invasion of the Saracens in 824 AD the city was destroyed and plundered. 

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

title: Innsbruck: Holzwurm Andy auf dem Weihnachtsmarkt
Mixed-up Duck
description: Ducks are a rare sight in Malta. Even mallards are considered notable by the local birding community. This duck was swimming around the boats moored in St. George's Bay in Birzebbuga. It is obviously a hybrid - a mix of mallard and red-crested pochard has been suggested, which would explain the eye colour and body pattern. However, the head and bill suggest scaup rather than mallard in the mix to me.

title: Luzzu Antoine
description: One of many traditional Maltese fishing boats in Marsaxlokk harbour. They are characterised by their bright colours and the pair of eyes on the bow. Many luzzus around Malta are used to carry tourists, but these spend their time engaged in traditional, sustainable fishing.

Eyprepocnemis plorans
description: These distinctive grasshoppers - common name white-banded grasshopper - were abundant all around Malta. This particular one was one of many encountered on a walk around the coast between Marsaxlokk and Birzebbuga.

title: House of the Blackheads (Riga)
description:
House of the Blackheads (Latvian: Melngalvju nams, German: Schwarzhäupterhaus) is a building situated in the old town of Riga, Latvia. The original building was erected during the first third of the 14th century for the Brotherhood of Blackheads, a guild for unmarried merchants, shipowners, and foreigners in Riga. Major works were done in the early 17th century, adding most of the Mannerist ornamentation. The sculptures were made by the workshop of August Volz.

The building was bombed to a ruin by the Germans on June 28, 1941 and the remains were demolished by the Soviets in 1948. It was rebuilt between 1996 and 1999 with funds provided by Valērijs Kargins, the president of Parex Bank.

A Roland statue is a statue of a knight with a drawn sword, signifying the town privileges of a medieval city. Such statues exist in a number of cities notably in northern and eastern Germany, where they are often placed on the market square or in front of the city hall. Examples are also known from Central Europe, Croatia and Latvia, and there are copies in Brazil and the United States. Statues of the mythological Roland, who enjoyed the status as a popular hero, were erected in cities during the Middle Ages as an emblem of the freedom and city rights of a town. In Germany, such a town is sometimes known as a Roland town (German: Rolandstadt). Philippe Dollinger notes that although there are several Roland statues in the Baltic Sea area, there is nothing specifically Hanseatic about them. Rather, Roland statues are known mainly from cities that used Saxon Law

The first Roland statues began to appear in the 12th century, placed outside churches. During the 14th and 15th centuries, Roland statues became more common. Especially during the reign of the Holy Roman Emperor Charles IV, such statues became more common, a fact that may be explained by the Emperor's ambition to portray himself as the heir to Charlemagne's reign The earliest Roland statues were made of wood, while later examples were more often made of stone.
ELL loc 193 221, gehuurd door PKP Intercity, met EN 453 van Paris Est naar Moskva Belorusskaja kort voor Zbąszynek. 15 november 2019.

title: Kościół pw. św. Józefa
description:
St. Joseph's Church (Polish: Kościół św. Józefa) is a historic Catholic church in the Podgórze district of Kraków, Poland. It is located on Podgórski Square on the northern slopes of the Krzemionki foothills in the south-central part of the city.
The church was built between 1905 and 1909, and designed by Jan Sas Zubrzycki in the Gothic Revival style. It is the largest church in the area.

title: Kreta - Kloster Agia Triada 01
description:
Moni Agia Triada (auch Agios Triados Tsangarolon) wurde 1631 am südlichen Rand des nordöstlichen Gebirgszuges von Akrotiri erbaut. Es ist eine der heiligen Dreifaltigkeit geweihte Gründung zweier venezianischer Mönche, die der orthodoxen Kirche beigetreten waren, den Brüdern Giancarolo (Zangarola). Sie renovierten ein älteres Kloster, das ihnen von einer Familie Mourtari geschenkt worden war. Die in Oliven- und Orangenhaine eingebetteten Gebäude sind in venezianischem Renaissance-Stil errichtet. Sie wurden im Jahre 1830 wieder aufgebaut, nachdem das Kloster 1821 durch die herrschenden Türken niedergebrannt wurde. Moni Agia Triada untersteht direkt dem Patriarchat von Konstantinopel.

Moni Agia Triada (also Agios Triados Tsangarolon) was built in 1631 on the southern edge of the north-eastern mountain range of Akrotiri. It is a foundation dedicated to the Holy Trinity and was founded by two Venetian monks who had joined the Orthodox Church, the brothers Giancarolo (Zangarola). They renovated an older monastery that had been given to them by a Mourtari family. The buildings, nestled in olive and orange groves, are built in the Venetian Renaissance style. They were rebuilt in 1830, after the monastery was burned down by the ruling Turks in 1821. Moni Agia Triada is directly under the Patriarchate of Constantinople.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

title: Kreta - Chania 02
description:
Chania ist eine Hafenstadt auf der griechischen Insel Kreta. 53.910 Einwohner leben (laut Volkszählung von 2011) in der eigentlichen Kernstadt der Gemeinde, die damit nach Iraklio die zweitgrößte Siedlung auf der Insel ist. Gleichzeitig ist Chania der Hauptort des gleichnamigen Regionalbezirks, der ehemaligen Präfektur Chania, der den gesamten Westen Kretas umfasst. Chania war von 1841 bis 1971 die Hauptstadt der Insel Kreta.
Östlich des Stadtgebiets von Chania in der Souda-Bucht befindet sich der Fährhafen der Stadt, von dem eine tägliche Verbindung nach Piräus besteht. Der internationale Flughafen von Chania befindet sich ungefähr 12 Kilometer nordöstlich auf einer Ebene der Akrotiri-Halbinsel. 

Chania is a port city on the Greek island of Crete. 53,910 inhabitants live (according to the 2011 census) in the actual core city of the municipality, which is the second largest settlement on the island after Iraklio. At the same time, Chania is the capital of the regional district of the same name, the former prefecture of Chania, which covers the entire western part of Crete. Chania was the capital of the island of Crete from 1841 to 1971.
To the east of the city of Chania in the Souda Bay is the city's ferry port, from which there is a daily connection to Piraeus. The international airport of Chania is located about 12 kilometers northeast on a plain of the Akrotiri Peninsula. 

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Gleichzeitig ist Chania der Hauptort des gleichnamigen Regionalbezirks, der ehemaligen Präfektur Chania, der den gesamten Westen Kretas umfasst. Chania war von 1841 bis 1971 die Hauptstadt der Insel Kreta.
Östlich des Stadtgebiets von Chania in der Souda-Bucht befindet sich der Fährhafen der Stadt, von dem eine tägliche Verbindung nach Piräus besteht. Der internationale Flughafen von Chania befindet sich ungefähr 12 Kilometer nordöstlich auf einer Ebene der Akrotiri-Halbinsel. 

Chania is a port city on the Greek island of Crete. 53,910 inhabitants live (according to the 2011 census) in the actual core city of the municipality, which is the second largest settlement on the island after Iraklio. At the same time, Chania is the capital of the regional district of the same name, the former prefecture of Chania, which covers the entire western part of Crete. Chania was the capital of the island of Crete from 1841 to 1971.
To the east of the city of Chania in the Souda Bay is the city's ferry port, from which there is a daily connection to Piraeus. The international airport of Chania is located about 12 kilometers northeast on a plain of the Akrotiri Peninsula. 

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

title: Polistes dominula Cluster
description: A small example of a paper wasp cluster on a prickly pear fruit between Marsaxlokk and Birzebbuga. I initially thought this was mating behaviour with males mobbing a female. However, a little background reading revealed that the formation of increasingly large clusters is part of the preparation for winter hibernation.

title: Armada LNG Mediterrana
description:
Malta has no fossil fuel resources so its energy needs are satisfied through oil and gas imports. Armada LNG Mediterrana (IMO 8125868) is a 70,000 tonne gas tanker seen here supplying Delimara Power Station near Marsaxlokk.

This shot was taken from the same spot as the previously posted shot of Marsaxlokk but looking the other way. Such are the contrasts of Malta!

title: Marsaxlokk
description: This is the Maltese fishing village of Marsaxlokk on the south coast. It has a waterfront market that is at its most active on Sunday. However, to me its greatest attraction are the seafood restaurants on the waterfront where the local catch is served at very reasonable prices.

title: Στην κορυφή της Πεντέλης
description: Νοέμβριος 2019. Το κολωνάκι στην κορυφή του βουνού με το χαρακτηριστικό δέντρο σημαία λίγο πιο πέρα... Σημείωση: Το σημείο λήψης της φωτογραφίας απεικονίζεται στο χάρτη, αλλά η yahoo ενδέχεται να μην αναφέρει τη σωστή ονομασία της περιοχής. ******************************************************************************* Στατιστικά από το gps της πεζοπορικής ανάβασης στην Πεντέλη με αφετηρία από το Πάτημα (246m), έως την κορυφή Πυργάρι (1109m) και τερματισμό της διαδρομής στην πλατεία της Παλαιάς Πεντέλης (450m). Η διαδρομή ήταν βατή στο σύνολό της, αλλά με μεγάλο μήκος, ενώ η συνολική υψομετρική έφτασε τα 1079 μέτρα. Αν και σε ορισμένα σημεία περπατήσαμε εκτός μονοπατιού, δηλαδή ελεύθερα στις πλαγιές του βουνού, δεν ήταν δύσκολο να ξαναβρούμε το ή τα μονοπάτια, καθώς η χαμηλή βλάστηση επιτρέπει ακόμη την οπτική επαφή με διάφορα σημεία του βουνού. Η διαδρομή είχε 5 στάδια. Πρώτο στάδιο η αστική πεζοπορία από το Πάτημα (246m) έως την Παλαιά Πεντέλη (450m), μία διαδρομή σταθερά ανηφορική. Δεύτερο στάδιο η ανάβαση από την Παλαιά Πεντέλη στη Σπηλιά του Νταβέλη (700m), ακολουθώντας τμήμα της αρχαίας λιθαγωγίας οδού. Τρίτο στάδιο το πέρασμά μας μέσα από τα παλαιά λατομεία από φιδωτό μονοπάτι και ανάβαση στην κορυφή Πυργάρι (1109m). Τέταρτο στάδιο η κατάβαση από την κορυφή έως το εκκλησάκι των Αγίων Ασωμάτων (800m). Πέμπτο στάδιο η κατάβαση και τερματισμός της διαδρομής στην πλατεία της Παλαιάς Πεντέλης. Ο καιρός ήταν καλός με ηλιοφάνεια, πολύ καλές θερμοκρασίες για την εποχή, ασθενείς ανέμους ή ένα ελαφρύ βοριαδάκι σε συγκεκριμένα περάσματα του βουνού όπου δημιουργείται καναλισμός. Μόνο στην κορυφή η ψύχρα ήταν έντονη. Κατεβαίνοντας το μεσημέρι προς την πλατεία της Παλαιάς Πεντέλης για μία ακόμη ημέρα ο καιρός θύμιζε θερμοκρασιακά μέσα Οκτώβρη... Οι ξεχωριστές στιγμές της διαδρομής ήταν το πέρασμα από τη θέση Συμπληγάδες όπου δεν έχει ονομαστεί τυχαία έτσι, η ανάβαση στην κορυφή Πυργάρι (1109m), όπου ο καιρός μας επέτρεψε να δούμε πολλά βουνά σε ακτίνα 360 μοιρών, αλλά και η στάση μας στο γραφικό εκκλησάκι των Αγίων Ασωμάτων. Στατιστικά από το gps: Υψόμετρο αφετηρίας 246m, Μέγιστο υψόμετρο διαδρομής 1109m, Υψόμετρική διαφορά αφετηρίας-κορυφής 863m, Συνολική υψομετρική διαφορά ανάβασης (Total Ascent) 1079 μέτρα, Συνολική υψομετρική διαφορά κατάβασης (Total Descent) 852 μέτρα, Συνολική πεζοπορία (Trip Odometer) 20,5 χλμ, Συνολικός χρόνος παραμονής στο βουνό (Total Time) 7 ώρες και 11 λεπτά Μέση ταχύτητα πεζοπορίας (Moving Avg) 3,5 km/h, Συνολική μέση ταχύτητα (Overall Avg) 2,9 km/h, Καθαρός χρόνος πεζοπορίας (Moving Time) 5 ώρες και 58 λεπτά, Συνολικός χρόνος στάσεων (Stopped Time) 1 ώρα και 13 λεπτά ******************************************************************************* Ενδεικτικά παλαιότερες πεζοπορικές αναβάσεις στην κορυφή Πυργάρι (1109m): Δεκέμβριος 2017: www.flickr.com/photos/ndimensi/albums/72157690759709975 Φεβρουάριος 2015: www.flickr.com/photos/ndimensi/albums/72157650435785650 Ιανουάριος 2015 (25/1): www.flickr.com/photos/ndimensi/albums/72157650059026009 Ιανουάριος 2015 (3/1): www.flickr.com/photos/ndimensi/albums/72157649687177160 Μάρτιος 2014: www.flickr.com/photos/ndimensi/albums/72157641761102615 Μάρτιος 2010: www.flickr.com/photos/ndimensi/albums/72157629680330899

title: Κορυφή Πυργάρι, 1109m
description: Νοέμβριος 2019. Το εκκλησάκι στην κορυφή της Πεντέλης με την ονομασία Μεταμόρφωση Σωτήρος... Σημείωση: Το σημείο λήψης της φωτογραφίας απεικονίζεται στο χάρτη, αλλά η yahoo ενδέχεται να μην αναφέρει τη σωστή ονομασία της περιοχής. ******************************************************************************* Στατιστικά από το gps της πεζοπορικής ανάβασης στην Πεντέλη με αφετηρία από το Πάτημα (246m), έως την κορυφή Πυργάρι (1109m) και τερματισμό της διαδρομής στην πλατεία της Παλαιάς Πεντέλης (450m). Η διαδρομή ήταν βατή στο σύνολό της, αλλά με μεγάλο μήκος, ενώ η συνολική υψομετρική έφτασε τα 1079 μέτρα. Αν και σε ορισμένα σημεία περπατήσαμε εκτός μονοπατιού, δηλαδή ελεύθερα στις πλαγιές του βουνού, δεν ήταν δύσκολο να ξαναβρούμε το ή τα μονοπάτια, καθώς η χαμηλή βλάστηση επιτρέπει ακόμη την οπτική επαφή με διάφορα σημεία του βουνού. Η διαδρομή είχε 5 στάδια. Πρώτο στάδιο η αστική πεζοπορία από το Πάτημα (246m) έως την Παλαιά Πεντέλη (450m), μία διαδρομή σταθερά ανηφορική. Δεύτερο στάδιο η ανάβαση από την Παλαιά Πεντέλη στη Σπηλιά του Νταβέλη (700m), ακολουθώντας τμήμα της αρχαίας λιθαγωγίας οδού. Τρίτο στάδιο το πέρασμά μας μέσα από τα παλαιά λατομεία από φιδωτό μονοπάτι και ανάβαση στην κορυφή Πυργάρι (1109m). Τέταρτο στάδιο η κατάβαση από την κορυφή έως το εκκλησάκι των Αγίων Ασωμάτων (800m). Πέμπτο στάδιο η κατάβαση και τερματισμός της διαδρομής στην πλατεία της Παλαιάς Πεντέλης. Ο καιρός ήταν καλός με ηλιοφάνεια, πολύ καλές θερμοκρασίες για την εποχή, ασθενείς ανέμους ή ένα ελαφρύ βοριαδάκι σε συγκεκριμένα περάσματα του βουνού όπου δημιουργείται καναλισμός. Μόνο στην κορυφή η ψύχρα ήταν έντονη. Κατεβαίνοντας το μεσημέρι προς την πλατεία της Παλαιάς Πεντέλης για μία ακόμη ημέρα ο καιρός θύμιζε θερμοκρασιακά μέσα Οκτώβρη... Οι ξεχωριστές στιγμές της διαδρομής ήταν το πέρασμα από τη θέση Συμπληγάδες όπου δεν έχει ονομαστεί τυχαία έτσι, η ανάβαση στην κορυφή Πυργάρι (1109m), όπου ο καιρός μας επέτρεψε να δούμε πολλά βουνά σε ακτίνα 360 μοιρών, αλλά και η στάση μας στο γραφικό εκκλησάκι των Αγίων Ασωμάτων. Στατιστικά από το gps: Υψόμετρο αφετηρίας 246m, Μέγιστο υψόμετρο διαδρομής 1109m, Υψόμετρική διαφορά αφετηρίας-κορυφής 863m, Συνολική υψομετρική διαφορά ανάβασης (Total Ascent) 1079 μέτρα, Συνολική υψομετρική διαφορά κατάβασης (Total Descent) 852 μέτρα, Συνολική πεζοπορία (Trip Odometer) 20,5 χλμ, Συνολικός χρόνος παραμονής στο βουνό (Total Time) 7 ώρες και 11 λεπτά Μέση ταχύτητα πεζοπορίας (Moving Avg) 3,5 km/h, Συνολική μέση ταχύτητα (Overall Avg) 2,9 km/h, Καθαρός χρόνος πεζοπορίας (Moving Time) 5 ώρες και 58 λεπτά, Συνολικός χρόνος στάσεων (Stopped Time) 1 ώρα και 13 λεπτά ******************************************************************************* Ενδεικτικά παλαιότερες πεζοπορικές αναβάσεις στην κορυφή Πυργάρι (1109m): Δεκέμβριος 2017: www.flickr.com/photos/ndimensi/albums/72157690759709975 Φεβρουάριος 2015: www.flickr.com/photos/ndimensi/albums/72157650435785650 Ιανουάριος 2015 (25/1): www.flickr.com/photos/ndimensi/albums/72157650059026009 Ιανουάριος 2015 (3/1): www.flickr.com/photos/ndimensi/albums/72157649687177160 Μάρτιος 2014: www.flickr.com/photos/ndimensi/albums/72157641761102615 Μάρτιος 2010: www.flickr.com/photos/ndimensi/albums/72157629680330899

title: Weihnachtsmarkt Magdeburg
description: Quelle: Volksstimme Magdeburg vom 7.November 2019 In der Landeshauptstadt Magdeburg gibt es mehrere Weihnachtsmärkte. Der größte Weihnachtsmarkt befindet sich vor und rund um das Rathaus in Magdeburg. Hier gibt es auch eine nordische Meile mit Spezialitäten aus Finnland, Schweden Dänemark und Norwegen. Auch einen mittelalterlichen historischen Weihnachtsmarkt befindet sich am Rathaus. Die Besonderheit dieses Weihnachtsmarktes ist eine mittelalterliche Sauna und dessen Bade-Bottich für bis zu acht Personen. Vom Bade-Bottich lässt sich das mittelalterliche Markttreiben besonders gut beobachten. Eine Waschfrau kümmert sich hierbei um das leibliche Wohl der Saunagäste und Badegäste. Die Weihnachtsmarktbesucher haben sich längst daran gewöhnt, Saunagäste und Badegäste nackig im Bottich zu sehen. Und wer sich nicht zutraut, sich nackt in der Öffentlichkeit des Markttreibens zu zeigen, zieht einfach den Vorhang zu. Info: www.historischer-weihnachtsmarkt-magdeburg.de/attraktione... :-) In the state capital Magdeburg there are several Christmas markets. The biggest Christmas market is in front of and around the town hall of Magdeburg. There is also a Nordic mile with specialties from Finland, Sweden Denmark and Norway. Also a medieval historic Christmas market is located by the town hall. The special feature of this Christmas market is a medieval sauna with a bath tub for up to eight people. From the bath tub, the medieval market activity can be observed very well. A washerwoman takes care of the physical well-being of the sauna guests and bathers. The Christmas market visitors have long since become used to seeing sauna guests and bathers naked in the tub. And those who do not dare to show themselves nude at the public market in the bath tub, simply pulls the curtain. Info: www.historischer-weihnachtsmarkt-magdeburg.de/attraktione... :-) Info Weihnachtsmarkt in Magdeburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland: Info Christmas Market in Magdeburg, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany: Info Weihnachtsmarkt Magdeburg: www.weihnachtsmarkt-magdeburg.de/ und: / and: www.historischer-weihnachtsmarkt-magdeburg.de und: / and: www.historischer-weihnachtsmarkt-magdeburg.de/attraktione... und: / and: www.facebook.com/events/weihnachtsmarkt-magdeburg :-) Magdeburg hat sich als Kulturhauptstadt Europas für das Jahr 2025 beworben und hat gute Chancen Kulturhauptstadt Europas zu werden! Magdeburg has applied for the European Capital of Culture for the year 2025 and has good chances to become European Capital of Culture! Positano
description:
A 18 km de Sorrente et 15 km d'Amalfi, Positano est le village le plus touristique de la côte amalfitaine, épousant un amphithéâtre rocheux suspendu entre ciel et mer. Il connut son heure de gloire aux XVIème et XVIIème siècles lorsque ses navires commerçaient avec le Proche et Moyen-Orient, témoin les traces arabisantes de sin architectures, notamment les toits bombés d'influence tunisienne.

Repérable par son campanile édifié en 1707 en plein centre de Positano, l'église San Maria Assunta résulte de travaux réalisés de 1777 à 1782, son dôme étant couvert de majoliques. L'intérieur comprend trois nefs, cinq arcs et cinq chapelles. De nombreux tableaux et fresques datés du XVème et XVIème siècles rappellent l'origine mouvementée de cette église sur les ruines de l'abbaye existant du Xème siècle au XVème siècles (cf. xikipédia, Guide du routard).

title: portale di Diana
description: _697 | 11_19 | _ Oggi vi voglio far vedere questo scatto eseguito fuori porta, qui poco lontano da casa, nei colli Euganei. Quando passo per Valsanzibio, una località di Galzignano Terme,mi piace fare una sosta presso Villa Barbarigo .Scattata pochi giorni fà , in tutto lo splendore della luce d'autunno. Today I want to show you this shot taken out of town, here not far from home, in the Euganean hills. When I go through Valsanzibio, a town in Galzignano Terme, I like to stop at Villa Barbarigo. Taken a few days ago, in all the splendor of autumn light. All rights reserved. © ph.p.photography , ph.p.ph.©. Many thanks to everyone for your views, faves and supportive comments. title: Gate, Petrou Papasideri, Markópoulo, Attika, Athens, Greece
LANCENIGO. NATALE DA BARDIN
description:
QUI LUCI E COLORI NON MANCANO


L’attuale sede di Bardin Garden Store, azienda storica del Trevigiano che opera sin dagli anni 70, è stata costruita ex-novo in un’area di 33.000 mq ed inaugurata nel 2016.
I reparti comprendono: piante di ogni tipo, vasi, terricci, concimi ed attrezzi, fioreria, pet-animaleria, fattoria ludica, arredo giardino e barbecue, oltre al famoso Paese Del Natale.
Da una decina d'anni non manco l'occasione di farci una visita perché in questo megastore dedicato al giardinaggio, nel periodo natalizio è un'autentico festival  degli addobbi natalizi.
-----------------------------------------

HERE LIGHTS AND COLORS ARE NOT MISSING


The current headquarters of Bardin Garden Store, a historic company in the Treviso area that has been operating since the 1970s, was built from scratch in an area of 33,000 square meters and inaugurated in 2016.
The departments include: plants of all kinds, pots, soils, fertilizers and tools, florists, pet-animals, play farms, garden furniture and barbecues, as well as the famous Christmas Village.
For about ten years I have not missed the opportunity to pay us a visit because in this megastore dedicated to gardening, during the Christmas period it is an authentic festival of Christmas decorations.

description:
AUGURO UN BUON NATALE ED UN FELICE NUOVO ANNO A TUTTI.
-------------------------------------------
WISH A MERRY CHRISTMAS & HAPPY NEW YEAR A EVERYONE.
-------------------------------------------


Moltissimi di noi trascorreranno il Natale ed il fine anno in famiglia mantenendo il distanziamento consigliato per legge e sotto sotto  tutto questo non verrà per nuocere...chissà che riscoprire il calore che si vivrà in compagnia dei nostri cari non ci faccia rivalutare affetti un pò dimenticati.

title: CHRISTMAS TIME. VILLAGGIO IN MINIATURA.
description:
UN MONDO FANTASTICO CHE FA BENE AL CUORE.


Manca pochissimo alla celebrazione del Natale e tutti si preparano ad accogliere una tra le feste più attese dell’anno. Strade e vetrine si riempiono di festoni, le case si apprestano ad ospitare presepi ed abeti, i giardini lampeggiano di luci colorate. 
La pandemia sta rivoluzionando tutte le tradizioni popolari e religiose di queste queste Feste del 2020; saranno diverse da tutte quelle vissute finora e la voglia di leggerezza e condivisione porterà le famiglie a viverle intensamente, raccolte attorno al focolare domestico.

title: Protest Pamphlet
description: We came across this yellow vest protest at a traffic circle as we left the highway south of Bordeaux to make our way towards the Pyreneés. All very calm and well-controlled, the gendarmes ringing the roundabout so that the traffic was undisturbed, the protesters gathered around barbecue fires. We were given a pamphlet and wished a pleasant journey.

title: proportion
description:
Das Nationaldenkmal am Prager Vitkov-Hügel (auch als Žižka-Denkmal bezeichnet) ist ein patriotisches Monument zu Ehren des Hussitenführers Jan Žižka im Prager Stadtteil Žižkov.

Das Nationaldenkmal auf dem Veitsberg (Vítkov) besteht aus einem 9 m hohen und 16,5 Tonnen schweren Reiterstandbild Jan Žižkas sowie aus einer dahinter anschließenden mehrstöckigen Ehrenhalle.

Das Žižka-Reiterstandbild gilt als eine der größten Bronzestatuen der Welt. Die Größe lässt sich gut erahnen, wenn man auf den Herrn zu Füßen des Monuments blickt.
____________________________________________________

The National Monument on Vitkov (also called the Žižka Monument) is a patriotic monument in honour of the Hussite leader Jan Žižka in the Prague district of Žižkov.

The national monument consists of a 9-metre-high and 16.5-ton statue of Jan Žižka on horseback.

The Žižka equestrian statue is one of the largest bronze statues in the world.

title: borgo vecchio XIII secolo | prima cinta muraria
Venus von Eggendorf
description: Venus von Eggendorf 157 cm große Replik der Venus von Eggendorf vor dem Höbarth-Museum in Horn. 1930 fand der Heimatforscher Josef Hörbath in Eggendorf am Walde eine 24 cm große Tonfigur die zeitlich zwischen 4900 und 4300 v. Chr. einzuordnen ist. Die mit betont weiblichen Merkmalen ausgestattete Figur stellt ein Fruchtbarkeitssymbol dar. 157 cm replica of Venus von Eggendorf in front of the Höbarth Museum in Horn. In 1930 the local researcher Josef Hörbath found a 24 cm clay figure in Eggendorf am Walde, which dates from 4900 to 4300 BC. BC is classified. The figure, with its emphatically feminine features, represents a fertility symbol. More Info: www.noe-3d.at/horn_venus_eggendorf.php

title: NATALE DA BARDIN. ADDOBBI.
description:
ANCHE UN PESCE BLU PUO' ABBELLIRE L'ALBERO.


Nella memoria di ognuno di noi ci sono certamente delle Poesie di Natale, di quelle che ci facevano studiare a memoria da bambini a scuola e che poi recitavamo al pranzo di Natale davanti a parenti e amici con cui festeggiavamo la festa più calda e amata dell’anno.
A pensarci bene, potremmo recitarne ancora dei versi…

ARRIVA NATALE 
di Jolanda Restano

Cade la neve, scende dal cielo
e lieve, lieve copre di un velo
case e palazzi, strade e sentieri,
tetti aguzzi e comignoli neri.

Non c’è rumore, tutto tace
ascolto il mio cuore: senti che pace!
Arriva Natale, crea l’atmosfera
senti nel cuore la pace vera!


Immagine realizzata con lo smartphone HUAWEI MATE 20 PRO

title: Ladies Galore
description: This is another insect shot from the little park along the shore of St. Julian's Bay with no less than four painted lady butterflies. However, this is nothing. The whole hedge of this flowering shrub was covered in butterflies with dozens more hovering over it. I have never seen so many together before.

title: NATALE DA BARDIN.
description:
IDEE DA METTERE SULL'ALBERO.


L’albero di Natale è, con la tradizione del presepe, una delle più diffuse usanze natalizie. Si tratta in genere di un abete (o altra conifera sempreverde) addobbato con piccoli oggetti colorati, luci, festoni, dolciumi, piccoli regali impacchettati e altro. Questo può essere portato in casa o tenuto all’aperto, e viene preparato qualche giorno o qualche settimana prima di Natale (spesso nel giorno dell’Immacolata concezione), e rimosso dopo le feste. Soprattutto se l’albero viene collocato in casa, è tradizione che ai suoi piedi vengano collocati i regali di Natale impacchettati, in attesa del giorno della festa in cui potranno essere aperti.


Immagine realizzata con lo smartphone Huawei Mate 20 Pro

title: IMGP5606
description:
"CHE MI CI PRENDE L’ANIMA"
produzione Teatro Insonne
Da il diario di Eva-Maria sotto la croce
di DARIO FO e FRANCA RAME
con Sara Venuti e Riccardo Yorke Reali

Eva, la prima donna nata, nel Paradiso scopre la gioia dello scoprirsi vivi, l’amore e il desiderio per l’altro. 
Maria, la madre di Gesù, giunta dinnanzi alla croce conosce invece la più grande sofferenza: la morte del figlio.
In un’ironica e struggente visione, le due donne bibliche ci raccontano l’inizio e la fine dell’amore, dando vita a due storie che ci parlano, con semplicità e immediatezza, delle nostre vite, delle nostre felicità e dei nostri più intimi dolori.

In un’ironica e struggente visione, le due donne bibliche ci raccontano l’inizio e la fine dell’amore, dando vita a due storie che ci parlano, con semplicità e immediatezza, delle nostre vite, delle nostre felicità e dei nostri più intimi dolori.

Maria, la madre di Gesù, giunta dinnanzi alla croce conosce invece la più grande sofferenza: la morte del figlio.
In un’ironica e struggente visione, le due donne bibliche ci raccontano l’inizio e la fine dell’amore, dando vita a due storie che ci parlano, con semplicità e immediatezza, delle nostre vite, delle nostre felicità e dei nostri più intimi dolori.

title: NATALE DA BARDIN 2019
description:
POLAR EXPRESS.


Polar Express (The Polar Express) è un film del 2004 diretto da Robert Zemeckis.

Il film si basa sulla sceneggiatura di Eddie Deezen e William Broyles Jr., mentre il soggetto è tratto dall'omonimo libro illustrato per ragazzi di Chris Van Allsburg, pubblicato nel 1985 e premiato l'anno successivo con la Medaglia Caldecott.Inoltre si tratta del primo cartone animato realizzato in CGI utilizzando la tecnica della performance capture (ossia con personaggi digitali ottenuti "captando" i movimenti degli attori in carne e ossa), motivo per cui è entrato a far parte del Guinness dei primati. Questo film rappresenta l'ultima interpretazione dell'attore Michael Jeter, deceduto durante la lavorazione.

È la notte della Vigilia di Natale e un bambino è fortemente convinto che sotto l'albero i regali verranno messi dai suoi genitori e non da Babbo Natale, alla cui esistenza non crede affatto. Proprio pochi minuti prima di mezzanotte, sulla strada che costeggia la sua casa, giunge un misterioso treno a vapore che sembra apparso dal nulla, chiamato Polar Express; il controllore, un uomo burbero ma bonario, svela al giovane che tale treno conduce i bambini al Polo Nord permettendo loro di incontrare Babbo Natale. Nonostante i suoi dubbi, il bambino decide di salire a bordo.Ecc.ecc.


Tratto da "Wikipedia l'enciclopedia libera"

Immagine realizzata con lo smartphone HUAWEI MATE 20 PRO

title: NATALE 2019. BARDIN GARDEN STORE.
description:
IL PAESE DEL NATALE IN UNA SERRA.


Avendo l'opportunità di essere frequentemente a Treviso e dintorni, grazie a mio cognato Luciano,non manco mai ad una visita alle serre Bardin,autentico paradiso dell'oggettistica natalizia.

Il Paese del Natale di Bardin Garden Store è diventato oramai per molti un appuntamento fisso e molto atteso, sicuramente l’esposizione di articoli natalizi più attesa ed apprezzata del Veneto.


In EXPLORE il 03/12/2019 al n. 152

title: Leaning Tower
description: Pisa, Italy

title: From Tuscany to Pisa ticket
description:
From Tuscany to Pisa
Date: November 16, 2019 
A Tour of Italy’s Square of Miracles -- See the famous Leaning Tower and its magnificent Square of Miracles on this included tour. You will join your guide for a scenic drive through Tuscany to Pisa. The origins of this ancient city are unclear, but the presence of an Etruscan necropolis points to a very long history. Upon arrival, walk to the Piazza dei Miracoli, or the Square of Miracles, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. In the marble-clad Romanesque Pisa Cathedral you will discover a breathtaking interior adorned with Byzantine-influenced mosaics. It is said that Galileo formulated his theory of pendulums here by observing an incense burner swinging from the ceiling. Also in the square, you will see the grand circular Baptistery, the Leaning Tower, which took 177 years to build, and the walled Camposanto Monumentale, said to be the most beautiful cemetery in the world. After your tour, you will have free time to explore.

title: IMGP5617
description:
"CHE MI CI PRENDE L’ANIMA"
produzione Teatro Insonne
Da il diario di Eva-Maria sotto la croce
di DARIO FO e FRANCA RAME
con Sara Venuti e Riccardo Yorke Reali

Eva, la prima donna nata, nel Paradiso scopre la gioia dello scoprirsi vivi, l’amore e il desiderio per l’altro. 
Maria, la madre di Gesù, giunta dinnanzi alla croce conosce invece la più grande sofferenza: la morte del figlio.
In un’ironica e struggente visione, le due donne bibliche ci raccontano l’inizio e la fine dell’amore, dando vita a due storie che ci parlano, con semplicità e immediatezza, delle nostre vite, delle nostre felicità e dei nostri più intimi dolori.

di DARIO FO e FRANCA RAME
con Sara Venuti e Riccardo Yorke Reali

Eva, la prima donna nata, nel Paradiso scopre la gioia dello scoprirsi vivi, l’amore e il desiderio per l’altro. 
Maria, la madre di Gesù, giunta dinnanzi alla croce conosce invece la più grande sofferenza: la morte del figlio.
In un’ironica e struggente visione, le due donne bibliche ci raccontano l’inizio e la fine dell’amore, dando vita a due storie che ci parlano, con semplicità e immediatezza, delle nostre vite, delle nostre felicità e dei nostri più intimi dolori.

Eva, la prima donna nata, nel Paradiso scopre la gioia dello scoprirsi vivi, l’amore e il desiderio per l’altro. 
Maria, la madre di Gesù, giunta dinnanzi alla croce conosce invece la più grande sofferenza: la morte del figlio.
In un’ironica e struggente visione, le due donne bibliche ci raccontano l’inizio e la fine dell’amore, dando vita a due storie che ci parlano, con semplicità e immediatezza, delle nostre vite, delle nostre felicità e dei nostri più intimi dolori.

title: Village fountain (češma) at Knežje
description: www.youtube.com/watch?v=vldLiBNatBM A very famous folk song about the village fountain. СИНТЕЗИС - Во наше село чешма шарена/SYNTHESIS - Vo naše selo češma šarena In our village, [there is] a fountain, [Where] icy-cold water ran. At the fountain, two-to-three fair maidens Filled their pitchers with icy-cold water.
